query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vineyard_blocks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  block_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  variety VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  area_ha DECIMAL(6,2),
  planting_year INT,
  rootstock VARCHAR(128),
  training_system ENUM('VSP','Scott Henry','Smart-Dyson','Pergola','Bush Vine','Other') DEFAULT 'VSP',
  soil_type VARCHAR(256),
  aspect VARCHAR(256),
  notes TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX vb_user_idx (user_id),
  INDEX vb_block_name_idx (block_name, user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vineyard_observations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  block_id INT NOT NULL,
  observation_type ENUM('budburst','flowering','veraison','harvest_date','spray_application','irrigation','canopy_management','disease_scouting','yield_estimate','other') NOT NULL,
  observed_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  vintage_year INT NOT NULL,
  value DECIMAL(8,2),
  unit VARCHAR(32),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX vo_user_idx (user_id),
  INDEX vo_block_idx (block_id),
  INDEX vo_vintage_idx (vintage_year)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vineyard_blocks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  block_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  variety VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  area_ha DECIMAL(6,2),

  soil_type VARCHAR(256),
  aspect VARCHAR(256),
  notes TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX vb_user_idx (user_id),
  INDEX vb_block_name_idx (block_name, user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vineyard_observations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  block_id INT NOT NULL,
  observation_type ENUM('budburst','flowering','veraison','harvest_date','spray_application','irrigation','canopy_management','disease_scouting','yield_estimate','other') NOT NULL,
  observed_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  vintage_year INT NOT NULL,
  value DECIMAL(8,2),
  unit VARCHAR(32),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX vo_user_idx (user_id),
  INDEX vo_block_idx (block_id),
  INDEX vo_vintage_idx (vintage_year)
);
